ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "experimental_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed conditions under which the experiment was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("principal_investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the treatment */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the concentration */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., chemical, physical) */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of treatment application (e.g., injection, topical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genotypes" (
  "genotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genotype */,
  "genotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the genotype */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the genotype */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the genotype */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Genetic modifications in the genotype */,
  "reference_genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference genome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genotypes_reference_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_genome_id") REFERENCES reference_genomes ("reference_genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., m, f) */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replicates" (
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replicate */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Number of the replicate */,
  "replicate_date" TEXT /* Date the replicate was conducted */,
  "replicate_location" TEXT /* Location where the replicate was conducted */,
  "replicate_conditions" TEXT /* Specific conditions for the replicate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replicate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_treatments" (
  "experiment_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-treatment link */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_treatments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_treatments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_genotypes" (
  "experiment_genotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-genotype link */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "genotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genotype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_genotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_genotypes_genotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("genotype_id") REFERENCES genotypes ("genotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_genotypes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sexes" (
  "experiment_sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-sex link */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sexes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sexes_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_replicates" (
  "experiment_replicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-replicate link */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replicate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_replicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_replicates_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_replicates_replicate_id FOREIGN KEY ("replicate_id") REFERENCES replicates ("replicate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "genotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genotype */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex */,
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replicate */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result value */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_genotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("genotype_id") REFERENCES genotypes ("genotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_replicate_id FOREIGN KEY ("replicate_id") REFERENCES replicates ("replicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the principal investigator */,
  "research_interest" TEXT /* Research interest of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_genomes" (
  "reference_genome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference genome */,
  "genotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the genotype */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the reference genome */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reference genome */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reference genome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_genome_id")
)
